title: Floral Australian Chickpea Flour Crumble
description: A kid-friendly floral-flavored dish featuring chickpea flour and other simple pantry staples for a crispy, flavorful snack or light meal.
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Mix chickpea flour, sugar, almond meal, vanilla extract, and baking powder in a mixing bowl.
Add coconut oil or vegan margarine bit by bit while stirring until well combined. The mixture should be crumbly but holds together when pressed with fingers.
Stir in apple cider vinegar to enhance the floral flavor and texture of the crumble. Taste and adjust seasoning if necessary.
Line a baking tray with parchment paper. Drop spoonfuls of the flour mix onto the lined tray and press into small, even-sized crumbles. Flatten slightly for better appearance and easier eating.
Bake in preheated oven for about 15-20 minutes or until lightly golden brown. Remove from oven when done to avoid burning.
Let cool on a wire rack before serving with your choice of yogurt, fruit compote, or as a simple snack.
